data.description: Fitch Ratings: slovenia economy resilient to series of external shocks
Fitch Ratings: projects Slovenia will maintain balanced primary budget position while preserving large liquidity buffers
Fitch Ratings: Slovenia fiscal credibility strengthened

data.title: Stock market reaches highs with Nvidia rising, but Palantir, Tesla fall. OpenAI conference, TSMC sales impact.
data.description: Market values are currently surging, with the stock market hitting new highs. Nvidia saw a significant increase in value on Friday, positioning itself in a favorable buy zone. On the other hand, Palantir and Tesla experienced notable declines. Investors are anticipating an upcoming OpenAI conference and monitoring sales performance by TSMC. This information was shared in a recent post discussing the current state of the market, particularly focusing on the Dow Jones Futures.
Fitch Ratings: outcome of Slovenias parliamentary elections expected in 1st half is unclear, but there is low risk of marked shift in macro-fiscal policy

data.title: New Pacific Metals Corp. (TSX: NUAG) files base shelf prospectus to replace expired one after September 16, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 3, 2025, New Pacific Metals Corp. (TSX: NUAG) (NYSE American: NEWP) has reported filing a final short form base shelf prospectus. The prior prospectus expired on September 16, 2025. This move comes as the Company's replacement to facilitate fundraising effectively.

data.title: Metallus and USW Local 1123 agree on new 4-year contract - exclusive details on October 3, 2025.
data.description: In Canton, Ohio, on October 3, 2025, Metallus, a top provider of specialty metals, components, and supply chain services, along with the United Steelworkers (USW) Local 1123, have come to a preliminary agreement for a fresh four-year contract. The negotiation involved key points such as wages, benefits, and working conditions. This deal is expected to cover a significant number of employees within the union and provide stability for the upcoming years. The specifics of the contract are yet to be disclosed, but both parties expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the discussions.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund on TSX - EIT.UN announces 2025 voluntary cash redemption in Calgary, Alberta.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on October 3, 2025, Canoe EIT Income Fund, known as Canoe or the Fund, revealed their voluntary cash redemption plan for 2025. The Fund is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol EIT.UN.

data.title: ILHA's INSPIRE Europe in Prague on Nov 12-13 will host luxury hospitality leaders with global sponsors.
data.description: Luxury hospitality leaders from Europe and beyond will gather at INSPIRE Europe, hosted by the International Luxury Hotel Association (ILHA) on November 12–13 at the Congress Centre of the Czech National Bank in Prague. The 15th edition of this event is expected to attract a large number of attendees, providing a platform for networking and discussions on industry trends and innovations.

data.title: California CASA honors Assemblymembers Ransom and Bonta at annual conference with Leadership in Action Award.
data.description: In Burlingame, California on October 3, 2025, CEO Sharon Lawrence, Esq. awarded Assemblymembers Rhodesia Ransom and Mia Bonta with the California CASA Leadership in Action Award at the annual conference. The award was given in recognition of their advocacy efforts.

data.title: Investigation launched by Edelson Lechtzin LLP into CarMax, Inc. for potential securities law violations. Contact if relevant.
data.description: Investigation into potential violations of federal securities laws concerning CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is underway by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a national class action law firm. The probe follows allegations of providing misleading business information. This news emerged in Newtown, Pa., on October 3, 2025.

data.title: Apollo Silver Corp. increases private placement offering, now offering up to 7,437,680 Units at $3.60 each for $26,775,648.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 03, 2025, Apollo Silver Corp. ("Apollo Silver" or "the Company") has decided to enlarge its non-brokered private placement offering due to high investor interest. The Company will now provide up to 7,437,680 Units at $3.60 per Unit, resulting in a total of $26,775,648 in aggregate gross proceeds from the expanded offering. The Units are listed on the TSX.V under the ticker symbol APGO, on the OTCQB as APGOF, and on the Frankfurt exchange as 6ZF0.

data.title: Workato launched Workato Enterprise MCP platform for AI agents allowing organizations to leverage AI with relevant data, connecting enterprise systems with powerful agent capabilities.
data.description: A company based in Palo Alto, California has recently unveiled the Workato Enterprise Model Context Protocol (MCP), which is being touted as the fastest, most secure, and comprehensive solution available in the industry. This protocol aims to facilitate the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) into organizational workflows by leveraging relevant data to perform tasks within various applications. Referred to as Workato Enterprise MCP, this innovative platform enables seamless connectivity between enterprise systems and AI agents such as Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor. By utilizing these AI agents, businesses can operate more effectively and efficiently.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets reports trading volume for September 2025, the world's leading exchange network.
data.description: Yesterday, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a top derivatives and securities exchange network based in Chicago, disclosed its trading volume statistics for September 2025. The company shared insights on its global business lines and offered forecasts for selected revenue per contract/net.

data.title: Coinbase seeks US banking license, joining crypto trend with new filing for National Trust Company Charter.
data.description: On Friday, Coinbase revealed its application for a National Trust Company Charter from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency.
